steps.title: Look for the same line
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions when both equations describe the same line. That happens when one equation is a constant multiple of the other.

steps.title: Find the matching system
steps.content: Multiplying $x+3y=15$ by $5$ gives $5x+15y=75$, exactly the second equation in one choice. $$5(x+3y)=5(15)$$ $$5x+15y=75$$ The answer is C.
